creator: mvh@netcom.com
text:
The latest 'gnats' port (Jan-20) contains code to support configurable
states.  Unfortunately, the code contains a bug or configuration
error.  When 'query-pr -i' is performed on the database in order to
emit SQL compatible output, all of the state information is mapped to
'0', or unknown, state.  This breaks our use of 'wwwgnats' internally.

How-To-Repeat: Install the Jan-20 'gnats' port, enter a few prs, and do a 'query-pr
-i'.
